mapper.sql: i.image_id, i.diary_id, d.user_id, i.image_path, i.sort, d.title AS diary_title, d.date AS diary_date, d.mood_key, CASE WHEN fp.image_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS favorite, d.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY d.date DESC, i.sort ASC, i.image_id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT YEAR(d.date) FROM diary_image i INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = i.diary_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY YEAR(d.date) DESC

SELECT i.image_path FROM diary_image i INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = i.diary_id LEFT JOIN favorite_photo fp ON fp.image_id = i.image_id AND fp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE d.user_id = #{userId}
AND d.date >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND d.date <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND fp.image_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.date DESC, i.sort ASC, i.image_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT i.image_id, i.diary_id, d.user_id, i.image_path, i.sort, d.title AS diary_title, d.date AS diary_date, d.mood_key, CASE WHEN fp.image_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS favorite, d.created_at FROM diary_image i INNER JOIN diary d ON d.diary_id = i.diary_id LEFT JOIN favorite_photo fp ON fp.image_id = i.image_id AND fp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND i.image_id = #{imageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO favorite_photo (user_id, image_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{imageId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite_photo WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND image_id = #{imageId}
